# tsParticles Ribbons

> Interactive showcase and playground for tsParticles ribbon animations. Explore ribbon modes (basic, custom colors, multiple bursts, continuous fall, custom canvas, fixed position) with a live code editor. Hosted at ribbons.js.org.

## Docs

- [Ribbons Modes](https://ribbons.js.org/): Interactive ribbon animation demos with live code editor
- [About tsParticles Ribbons](https://ribbons.js.org/about.html): Overview, features, and the tsParticles ecosystem
- [Getting Started Guide](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/getting-started.html): Quick start with script tags, npm, and framework components
- [Customization Guide](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/customization-guide.html): Colors, physics, positioning, and timing options
- [Framework Integration](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/framework-integration.html): Using ribbons with React, Vue, Angular, and Svelte
- [Performance Optimization](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/performance-guide.html): Tips for smooth 60fps rendering on all devices
- [Troubleshooting](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/troubleshooting.html): Fix rendering problems, color glitches, and framework issues
- [Real-World Examples](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/real-world-examples.html): Product launches, celebrations, backgrounds, and more
- [Ribbons + Confetti](https://ribbons.js.org/blog/ribbons-and-confetti.html): Combining both effects for double celebrations
- [tsParticles Documentation](https://particles.js.org/): Main tsParticles documentation site
- [tsParticles GitHub](https://github.com/tsparticles/tsparticles): Source code and issue tracker

## Core

- [Ribbons Preset](https://particles.js.org/demos/recipes/ribbons): Ribbon animation demo and recipe
- [Ribbon Shape Plugin](https://particles.js.org/options/plugin-shapes): Documentation for the ribbon shape plugin options
- [npm: @tsparticles/ribbons](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tsparticles/ribbons): npm package for @tsparticles/ribbons
